login.title: Platform admin
login.subtitle: Cross-tenant control plane · platform admins only
login.invalid: Wrong email or password, or this account is not a platform admin

noAccess.title: No platform access
noAccess.desc: This account is not a platform admin and cannot access the cross-tenant control plane.

overview.title: Platform overview
overview.desc: Tenants, usage and license status across the platform.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.subtitle: Provision, adjust quotas, suspend or restore tenants.
tenants.emptyDesc: Click "Provision tenant" to create the first tenant.

create.title: Provision tenant
create.planHint: Selecting a plan applies its default quotas; you can adjust them on the detail page afterward.

lifecycle.title: Tenant status
lifecycle.suspendDesc: Once suspended, all users in this tenant cannot sign in or read/write.
lifecycle.activateDesc: Once restored, users in this tenant can sign in again.
lifecycle.suspendConfirm: Suspend "{{name}}"? All its users will be unable to sign in.
lifecycle.activateConfirm: Restore "{{name}}"? Its users will be able to sign in again.
